about_text_1: Senior Fullstack Developer with 20+ years building performant, accessible web applications using Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and modern JavaScript. I specialize in translating complex requirements into elegant, user-centered interfaces that scale.
about_text_2: Frontend performance advocate who has reduced initial load times by up to 45% through code splitting, lazy loading, and optimized asset delivery. My implementations consistently achieve 90+ Lighthouse performance scores.
about_text_3: Built and led frontend initiatives that increased test coverage from 45% to over 80%, implementing automated testing pipelines that catch regressions before production. Created 20+ reusable component libraries adopted across multiple teams.
about_text_4: Currently available for remote projects. I thrive in collaborative, cross-functional teams where continuous learning and knowledge sharing drive product excellence.
experience_job_capitole: Senior Frontend Developer, Test Automation Engineer and Analyst Programmer
experience_job_text_allianz: Developed Svelte-based frontend modules for Meine Allianz, serving 2M+ insurance customers across Germany. Reduced feature delivery cycle by 30% through improved component architecture and code review processes in a cross-functional international team.
experience_job_text_lovetoknow: Led frontend architecture for YourDictionary.com (45M+ monthly visitors) using Vue.js and Nuxt.js. Improved Lighthouse performance scores from 55 to 92+, reducing Largest Contentful Paint by 60% through code splitting, lazy loading, and image optimization. Built a shared component library of 40+ reusable Vue components adopted by 3 product teams. Increased automated test coverage from 30% to 78%, catching 95% of regressions before deployment. Drove Nuxt 2 to Nuxt 3 migration across 5 micro-frontends with zero downtime.
experience_job_text_edreams: Owned frontend quality for a high-traffic travel booking platform processing 10M+ searches daily. Built automated testing pipeline (Karma unit tests + Gherkin E2E) running on Jenkins, reducing production bugs by 40%. Maintained 85%+ test coverage across Backbone and React codebases. Led A/B testing framework implementation, shipping 20+ experiments that improved conversion by 12%. Reviewed code across 6 frontend teams ensuring consistent best practices.
experience_job_text_capitole_1: Developed interactive booking interfaces for a major travel agency platform (Backbone, jQuery, Lodash), serving 500K+ monthly users. Refactored legacy code into modular components, reducing page load time by 35%. (10/2017 - 04/2018)
experience_job_text_capitole_2: Designed and deployed automated test suite (TestComplete + Jenkins CI) for a pharmaceutical compliance system. Cut regression testing from 3 days to 4 hours, achieving 92% automation coverage across 200+ test cases. (01/2017 - 10/2017)
experience_job_text_capitole_3: Architected migration of a legacy banking application to a responsive AngularJS SPA, serving 100K+ corporate banking users. Delivered project on schedule across 6 months, reducing page load times by 50% and enabling mobile access for field agents. (07/2016 - 12/2016)
experience_job_text_fiatc: Designed and built the online insurance sales platform handling 15K+ policies per year across travel assistance and motor insurance. Streamlined the quote-to-purchase flow, reducing drop-off by 25% and cutting average transaction time from 8 to 3 minutes.
experience_job_text_ict: Maintained the organization's public web portal and 3 internal web applications, ensuring 99.5% uptime. Built XML/XSLT publishing pipeline reducing content publication time from 2 days to 4 hours.
experience_job_text_secretariaplus: Developed and maintained ASP-based web application with SQL Server backend managing 10K+ client records. Built data entry interfaces that reduced processing time by 40% for administrative staff.
header_value_proposition: I turn complex business requirements into fast, accessible web experiences that users love and teams can maintain. I help companies accelerate delivery with solid frontend architecture, automated testing, and performance best practices.
header_location: Senior Fullstack Developer | Remote from Barcelona, Spain | Vue.js & Nuxt.js Expert
interests_text_1: I like to create websites for fun, trying out new technologies and tools to improve myself as a developer and stay up to date with current tech.
interests_text_2: Apart from being a frontend developer, I am a gym goer and enjoy training with barbells and iron plates. I also love watching TED talks and I also enjoy binge watching films and series on Netflix (for improving my english skills 😉).
interests_text_3: And during the summer, I enjoy go camping with my family near the sea.
skills_data_text_5: Calculation and analysis in SQL and spreadsheets
skills_workflow_text_4: Project management with Agile Methodologies and Scrum
